name: Design observability
when_to_use: Shape what to trace, trajectory capture, and drift/cost monitoring

name: Design the optimization loop
when_to_use: Shape the trace-and-eval flywheel, cadence, and stop/rollback

name: Design the autonomy controller
when_to_use: Shape controller preconditions, gates, circuit-breakers, and rollback

name: Design cost and reliability
when_to_use: Shape budgets, reliability targets, and a failure-mode-decomposed release gate

name: Assess maturity and route
when_to_use: Place on the maturity ladder, set governance/provenance, and route work to siblings
